home.heroSubtitle: I Am H.E.R.R is a Bronx-based organization delivering life-changing programs in education, careers, mental health, entrepreneurship, and community support — for young women, by people who believe in them.
home.missionText: Empower young women regardless of background, immigration status, or circumstance by delivering direct programs that open doors, build confidence, and create lasting change.
home.programsSubtitle: 10 programs designed to meet young women exactly where they are.
home.donateSubtitle: Your support funds workshops, scholarships, mentorship, and direct community services.

programs.title: Our Programs
programs.subtitle: From education to entrepreneurship, mental health to financial literacy — we deliver programs that create real opportunity.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question, want to partner with us, or just need to talk? We're here.

contact.subject: Subject

donate.title: Make a Difference Today
donate.subtitle: Your donation directly funds programs that change lives in the Bronx.
donate.impact25: Provides workshop materials for one participant
donate.impact50: Funds a prom dress for a young woman

footer.tagline: Empowering young women in the Bronx with life-changing programs and real support.
